chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-215 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 27.06.2023 Mr. Mansoor Ali Jatoi, advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG along with SIP Asghar Ali Sathio SHO PS SF Rahoo and SIP Mir Muhammad SHO PS Badin. ----- Mr. Shoukat Ali Pathan advocate has filed power on behalf of private respondents and submits that petitioner No.1 is already married with one Muhammad Ali from whom she has two kids. Petitioner No.1 has however denied such fact. In any case, police officials are directed to conduct proper inquiry and in case it turns up that petitioner No.1 was already married and has contracted present marriage without getting divorce from her previous husband, they should act in accordance with law. However, till such time, protection be provided to both parties and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
